\tzpentry{ID5092}{Coupled Hamiltonian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5092 introduces Coupled Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$\\hat{H}_{\\text{interaction}} = \\sum_{k,l} g_{kl} \\hat{a}^{\\dagger}_k \\hat{a}_l \\otimes \\hat{\\sigma}^{(k)}_+ \\hat{\\sigma}^{(l)}_-$$
